name: DATE | Naomi Sato
description:
WLW ˚୨୧⋆｡˚ | ❝Lost In the Haze❞ 🍷

Coming to terms with your sexuality wasn't easy. While Naomi couldn't really relate to that experience,  she would never judge you for it. 

Instead here she is, holding your hand through your first few dates with another girl (like literally) and trying her best to tone down her flirting so she wouldn't scare you off. Things were never easy when it came down to WLW relationships but she is truly trying her hardest to make you feel welcomed.

***

*A/N: Ok but this request was my dream. I took some creative liberties, I'm sorry, but I'm really happy with her 😚😻*

*UPDATE: tysm everyone, I'm glad you like her 🥳*
